response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: The vocal tracks perfectly match the song 'Kizuna no Kiseki'.
2. JSON Usage: The reference JSON only provided lyrics for the first verse and chorus; the remaining verses and bridge were manually transcribed and translated to ensure complete coverage.
3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps are tightly synchronized with the vocal delivery of both MC segments and the music performance. Subtitles are truncated immediately upon vocal completion to prevent cascading delays. On-screen song title text is captured as a visual event during the intro.

subtitles.original: 届いたかな？
subtitles.english: Did it reach you?

subtitles.original: てれれれれん！
subtitles.english: Da-da-da-da-dum!

subtitles.original: 常闇トワ 6周年記念LIVE！よろしくお願いします！
subtitles.english: This is the Tokoyami Towa 6th Anniversary Live! Please look forward to it!

subtitles.original: 目指せトレンド入り！
subtitles.english: Let's aim to get trending!

subtitles.original: えー、そしてね、この後はね、いろんな告知もありますので、最後まで見ていってくれればなと思います！
subtitles.english: And after this, we have various announcements, so I hope you watch until the very end!

subtitles.original: はい、えー、で今日なんですけれども、えー1月3日となっておりまして、
subtitles.english: Yes! As for today, it is January 3rd,

subtitles.original: えー世の中はお休みの日ということで、えー私もお休みの日ということで、
subtitles.english: and since it's a holiday for everyone, and a holiday for me as well,

subtitles.original: 本日のライブは全編収録となっております。よろしくお願いいたします。
subtitles.english: today's live is fully pre-recorded. Thank you for understanding!

subtitles.original: そして、この後はなんとゲストパート！
subtitles.english: And up next is the guest part!

subtitles.original: いっぱい、いろんなね、ゲストが出てくれるので、楽しみに見ていってくれればなと思います！
subtitles.english: Lots of different guests will be appearing, so please look forward to it!

subtitles.original: では！ゲストパート、どうぞ！
subtitles.english: Now, let's start the guest part!

subtitles.original: 絆ノ奇跡 / 作詞・作曲：Jean-Ken Johnny
subtitles.english: [Song: Kizuna no Kiseki / Lyrics/Composition: Jean-Ken Johnny]

subtitles.original: 闇夜を駆け抜けて 何処へむかう
subtitles.english: Racing through the dark night, where are we heading?

subtitles.original: 月明かりだけがただ一つの道標
subtitles.english: Only the moonlight is our only guidepost

subtitles.original: 痛みも悲しみも拭いきれず
subtitles.english: Unable to wipe away the pain and sadness

subtitles.original: されどこの胸 of 炎は消させない
subtitles.english: Yet, I won't let the flame in this chest be extinguished

subtitles.original: 誰が為に僕たちは この想いを貫いて
subtitles.english: For whose sake are we carrying through with these feelings?

subtitles.original: 闇を裂き 陽の下で 光さす日まで
subtitles.english: Tear through the darkness, under the sun, until the day the light shines

subtitles.original: 解き放たれた心に宿した火よ
subtitles.english: Oh, the fire that dwells in the unleashed heart

subtitles.original: 舞い上げ、まとえ 今 夜明けの向こう側へ
subtitles.english: Soar, wear it now, to the other side of the dawn

subtitles.original: 君がいる この世界もう一度愛せるまで
subtitles.english: Until I can love the world you exist in once more

subtitles.original: 我が命 果てようとも 繋いで行こう
subtitles.english: Even if my life meets its end, let us continue to connect

subtitles.original: 絆が紡いで 生まれた奇跡を
subtitles.english: The miracle born from the thread of bonds

subtitles.original: 昨日の哀楽 夢揺らめいてる現世
subtitles.english: The joys and sorrows of yesterday, the transient world where dreams sway

subtitles.original: 互いの正義をまた繰り返し振りかざす
subtitles.english: Once again, repeatedly brandishing our own justice

subtitles.original: 誰が為に繋ぐ命
subtitles.english: For whose sake do we connect our lives?

subtitles.original: 交わり縺れる定め
subtitles.english: Intersecting, tangling destinies

subtitles.original: 邪の道 溢たの罪 すべて薙ぎ払え
subtitles.english: The wicked path, countless sins, sweep them all away!

subtitles.original: 解き放て今 僕らが起こした火を
subtitles.english: Unleash now, the fire we kindled!

subtitles.original: 舞い上げ 走れば 明日が変わるはず
subtitles.english: Soar, and if we run, tomorrow should change

subtitles.original: 君といる この世界 二度と放さずに
subtitles.english: Being with you, never letting go of this world again

subtitles.original: 君と共にいく
subtitles.english: I will go together with you

subtitles.original: 瞼を閉じても 思い出すあの日を
subtitles.english: Even if I close my eyes, I remember that day

subtitles.original: 打ちのめされても 焦がれた未来を
subtitles.english: Even if we are beaten down, I still yearn for that future

subtitles.original: いつの日か君に 捧げて見せよう
subtitles.english: One day, I will show you that I can dedicate it to you

subtitles.original: 解き放たれた心に宿した火よ
subtitles.english: Oh, the fire that dwells in the unleashed heart

subtitles.original: 舞い上げ、まとえ 今 夜明けの向こうへ
subtitles.english: Soar, wear it now, to the other side of the dawn

subtitles.original: 解き放て今 僕らが起こした火を
subtitles.english: Unleash now, the fire we kindled!

subtitles.original: 舞い上げ 走れば 明日が変わるはず
subtitles.english: Soar, and if we run, tomorrow should change

subtitles.original: 君がいた この世界 もう一度愛せるまで
subtitles.english: Until I can love this world you were in once more

subtitles.original: 我が命 果てようとも 繋げて行くよ
subtitles.english: Even if my life meets its end, I will keep connecting

subtitles.original: 絆が紡いで 生まれた奇跡を
subtitles.english: The miracle born from the thread of bonds...
